title: Garmin just accidentally revealed pricing for its own Fitbit Air rival — but leaked images look awfully dubious
summary: Entering a different part number as a control (010-99999-99 in this case) returns an error, suggesting that the leaked data is not just a generic result that comes back any time you enter what looks like a Garmin part number.
